mentions.note: Optical fiber and data center infrastructure; Cramer's preferred pick over AAOI despite poor chart environment.
Preferred over AAOI for data center optical exposure. Hometown pride (Corning, NY) and superior fundamentals. Better positioned than alternatives.
Fiber-optics and glass for data-center buildout; Cramer much prefers Corning over AAOI. Strong regional tie (Corning, NY caller). Better risk/reward for data-center capex wave.

Optical fiber and data center infrastructure supplier. Luke asked about AAOI for data center play; Cramer redirects to Corning (better fundamentals). Chart looks bad like all tech, but Cramer prefers parachute to no parachute. Dwayne from Corning gets hometown nod.
Fiber displacing copper in data centers (speed, cybersecurity, corrosion); CEO Wendell Weeks' conviction crystal-clear; purchased at $77, now $190; Nvidia $3.2B stake validates thesis.
Charitable Trust holding, down 7% but parabolic move already; pullback insufficient to entice buy or add despite data center exposure.

Optical fiber critical infrastructure for AI data centers. Nvidia partnership multibillion-dollar commitment, tenfold capacity expansion, 3,000 jobs. Targets $20B (2026), $30B (2028), $40B (2030) revenue—exceptional for 175-year-old company.
Fiber optics for connecting data center infrastructure. Networking backbone.
Glass and fiber company; analyst meeting Wednesday; winning multi-billion dollar data-center contracts; should move stock.
Flew too close to sun on parabolic move; tumbled 9% despite announcing two huge clients; sell signal given parabolic nature; owned by Cramer's trust but needed correction.
Makes all fiber optic glass for data center buildout (replacing copper); critical infrastructure play; great stock.
Caller up 90% since December; trades 55x P/E but Cramer owns for charitable trust; glass and fiber taking over data centers—next-year estimates too low.
Materials and optical technology company rallying on hardware trend; supplies components for data centers and chip manufacturing.
Hit along with memory stocks by false AI memory-killer narrative; avoid chasing at current weakness.
Fiber company taking over what copper was in data centers; best-positioned in fiber infrastructure play; preferred over traditional copper exposure.
Owned for charitable trust with near-double gains; vulnerable in current volatile market; wait for 10+ pt dip before adding to existing position.
Fiber-optic specialist printing money on AI data center buildout; +45.7% February, +96% in trust since Cramer's September plant visit. $6B Meta supply deal Jan 2026 catalyst; guidance beat follows.

Won $6B Meta fiber optic cable deal; up 15% on announcement; travel trust bought big; Cramer sees potential for other hyperscalers (Microsoft, Tesla, Google, Amazon) and innovation in fiber for chip internals.
Replacing copper with fiber in data centers nationwide. Terrific prospects and owns the business; hope it comes down to buy.
